questionHtml:
A well tested scientific idea which has been used to make predictions cannot explain a particular event. Which statement describes the scientific approach to this dilemma?


A.  Hypothesis should be discarded.

B.  Hypothesis should be revised.

C.  Theory should be discarded.

D.  Theory should be revised.

meta.title: A well tested scientific idea which has been used to make predictions cannot explain a particular event. Which statement describes the scientific approach to this dilemma? A. Hypot
